title: Transit Carlsbad
writer: Zbynek Brynych, Josef Pick, Jan Procházka
actors: Valentina Thielová, Miroslav Machácek, Jirí Adamíra
plot: In the monotonous surroundings of a luxurious hotel in Karlovy Vary, an equally monotonous charade takes place in which several foreign agents show interest in a famous Austrian scientist, the discoverer of artificial proteins. Fo...
